rationale: Reviewer 'claude_cli:claude-opus-4-6' recommended 'major_revision'. Confidence=0.78. Weaknesses to address: Approximation quality is inconclusive: relative L2 error=0.767 (verdict='inconclusive', confidence=0.7) — a speedup that destroys output quality is not publishable; Only evaluated at seq_len=512, head_dim=64 — this is trivially short for a paper claiming 'long context' relevance; no scaling results despite 'long_context_scaling' listed in evidence_plan_keys; No downstream task evaluation (perplexity, accuracy) — latency/memory alone cannot justify the quality–speed tradeoff
